name: Bard

recommended.why: Fury of Blood greatly improves Bard's survivability through additional HP and Damage Reduction, allowing him to remain alive longer and continuously provide buffs and support to the entire team.

alternative.why: Knight Gear increases HP and Skill Damage, making it a viable alternative for players looking to maximize Bard's supportive abilities once survivability is no longer an issue.

investment.why: Bard is one of the strongest Legendary support heroes for League teams. His powerful buffs provide excellent value throughout the early and mid game, and he remains a reliable support option even in many late-game lineups until fully developed Mythic heroes become available.

description: Bard is a Legendary League support hero specializing in team-wide buffs and sustained battlefield support. His abilities significantly increase the effectiveness of allied heroes while providing valuable utility throughout every stage of progression, making him an excellent long-term investment for League-focused players.
